mapper.select: select ni.* from nursing_item ni, nursing_level_item_mapping m, nursing_level nl where nl.nursing_level_id = #{levelId} and ni.nursing_item_id = m.nursing_item_id and m.nursing_level_id = nl.nursing_level_id and ni.del_flag = '0' and nl.del_flag = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' order by ni.nursing_item_id desc limit #{pageStart}, #{pageSize}

select ni.* from nursing_item ni, nursing_level_item_mapping m, customer c where c.customer_id = #{customerId} and ni.nursing_item_id = m.nursing_item_id and m.nursing_level_id = c.nursing_level_id and ni.del_flag = '0' and c.del_flag = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and ni.status = #{status} and ni.nursing_item_name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and not exists ( select 1 from nursing_item_record nir where nir.customer_id = c.customer_id and nir.nursing_item_id = ni.nursing_item_id and nir.del_flag = '0' ) ORDER BY ni.nursing_item_id limit #{pageStart}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from nursing_item ni, nursing_level_item_mapping m, customer c where c.customer_id = #{customerId} and ni.nursing_item_id = m.nursing_item_id and m.nursing_level_id = c.nursing_level_id and ni.del_flag = '0' and c.del_flag = '0' and m.del_flag = '0' and ni.status = #{status}

select count(*) from nursing_item ni, nursing_level_item_mapping m, nursing_level nl where nl.nursing_level_id = #{levelId} and ni.nursing_item_id = m.nursing_item_id and m.nursing_level_id = nl.nursing_level_id and ni.del_flag = '0' and nl.del_flag = '0' and m.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update nursing_item set del_flag = '1' where nursing_item_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
